decisions.summary: Added `findVBriefInPrdDirs` to `src/lib/vbrief/io.ts` so start flows can recover a missing workspace plan from PRD-published vBRIEF copies before the workspace `.pan/spec.vbrief.json` exists.

Kept discovery path checks `existsSync`-only and enumerated known layouts explicitly: flat `PAN-123-plan.vbrief.json`, lowercase flat variants, lowercase per-issue subdirectories, uppercase per-issue subdirectories, and the `api/docs/prds/*` mirror. This keeps later dashboard callers compatible with the no-blocking-server rule.

hazards.summary: PRD-published vBRIEFs exist in multiple historical layouts and casing variants, so a narrow filename assumption would miss real plans during recovery.
hazards.mitigation: The helper now checks both active and planned PRD roots, both flat and subdirectory formats, both lowercase and uppercase issue IDs, and the mirrored `api/docs/prds` tree before returning null.

resumePoint.description: Implement bead workspace-qmrt by wiring `findVBriefInPrdDirs` into the dashboard start-agent flow so the route can import a PRD-scoped vBRIEF into the workspace before plan validation runs.

sessionHistory.note: Started PAN-945 implementation. Rebased onto main, removed stale continue.json, and created the bead set for the issue.
Completed bead workspace-d5qf by adding PRD-directory vBRIEF discovery in `src/lib/vbrief/io.ts` and verified the existing vbrief I/O test suite still passes after the change.
